fields.explainEn: Name of the core.

fields.explainZh: 当前索引搜索器的缓存逐出数量。
fields.explainEn: Number of cache evictions for the current index searcher.

fields.explainZh: 当前索引搜索器的命中数。
fields.explainEn: Number of hits for the current index searcher.

fields.explainZh: 插入到高速缓存中的次数。
fields.explainEn: Number of insertions into the cache.
Number of lookups against the cache.

fields.explainZh: 缓存应使用的最大堆，超过该堆将逐出密钥，-1表示无限制大小。
fields.explainEn: Maximum heap that should be used by the cache beyond which keys will be evicted.Value -1 indicates not limited.

fields.explainZh: 在该特定实例上缓存的实际堆使用情况。
fields.explainEn: Actual heap usage of the cache at that particular instance.

fields.explainZh: 已用缓存大小与最大缓存大小的比值。
fields.explainEn: Used Cache Size/Max Cache Size.
Java installation directory of the host.
Java vendor or the host.
Java version of the host.
Jetty directory of Solr.
Jetty version of Solr.
Architecture of the operating system on the host.
Name of the operating system on the host.
Version of the operating system on the host.
User directory of Solr.
Size of the current heap memory.
Initial heap memory value.
Max Heap Memory: Maximum heap memory value.
Used heap memory.

fields.explainZh: 已使用堆内存/堆内存最大值。
fields.explainEn: Value of Used Heap Memory to Heap Memory Size.
Size of the non-heap memory.
Initial non-heap memory value.

fields.explainZh: 非堆内存最大值，-1表示无限制大小。
fields.explainEn: Maximum non-heap memory value.Value -1 indicates not limited.
Used non-heap memory.

fields.explainZh: 非堆已用内存大小/非堆内存最大值。
fields.explainEn: Value of Used Non-Heap Memory to Non-Heap Memory Size.
Name of the core.

fields.nameZh: 每秒客户端错误数/5分钟
fields.nameEn: Client Errors per Second in 5 Minutes
fields.explainZh: 平均5分钟内客户端在发出请求时所犯的语法或解析错误数。
fields.explainEn: Number of syntax or parsing errors in client requests within an average of 5 minutes.

fields.nameEn: Search Errors per Second in 5 Minutes
fields.explainZh: 平均5分钟内处理程序遇到的错误数。
fields.explainEn: Number of errors encountered within an average of 5 minutes.

fields.explainZh: 在过去5分钟内每秒收到的请求数。
fields.explainEn: Number of requests per second received over the past 5 minutes.

fields.nameZh: 每秒服务器错误数/5分钟
fields.nameEn: Server Errors per Second in 5 Minutes
fields.explainZh: 平均5分钟内服务器在执行请求时抛出的错误数。
fields.explainEn: Number of errors thrown by the server when executing requests within an average of 5 minutes.

fields.nameEn: Search Responses per Second in 5 Minutes
fields.explainZh: 平均5分钟收到部分结果的响应数。
fields.explainEn: Number of responses received within an average of 5 minutes.
Version of the application.
Number of blocked threads.
Number of background threads.
Number of deadlock threads.
Number of newly created threads.
Number of active threads.
Number of terminated threads.
Number of waiting threads that are expired.
Total number of threads.
Number of waiting threads.

fields.explainZh: 平均5分钟内已执行的提交总数。
fields.explainEn: Total number of commits within an average of 5 minutes.
Name of the core.

fields.nameEn: Valid Additions per Second in 5 Minutes
fields.explainZh: 平均5分钟内执行的“有效”添加次数。当执行“ add”命令时，计数器递增；而当执行“ rollback”时，计数器递减。
fields.explainEn: Number of "effective" additions executed within an average of 5 minutes. The counter is incremented when "add" command is executed while decremented when "rollback" is executed.

fields.nameZh: 每秒按ID文档删除数/5分钟
fields.nameEn: Deleted Documents by ID per Second in 5 Minutes
fields.explainZh: 平均5分钟内通过ID执行的文档删除次数。当执行“删除”命令时，计数器递增；当执行“回滚”时，计数器递减。
fields.explainEn: Number of document deletions executed by ID within an average of 5 minutes. The counter is incremented when "delete" command is executed and decremented when "rollback" is executed.

fields.nameZh: 每秒按查询文档删除数/5分钟
fields.nameEn: Deleted Filtered Documents per Second in 5 Minutes
fields.explainZh: 平均5分钟内查询执行的文档删除次数。当执行“删除”命令时，计数器递增；当执行“回滚”时，计数器递减。
fields.explainEn: Number of document deletions executed by query within an average of 5 minutes. The counter is incremented when "delete" command is executed and decremented when "rollback" is executed.
Number of documents pending commit.

fields.explainZh: 在核心生命周期中对文档执行添加/删除/提交/回滚操作时收到的错误消息数。
fields.explainEn: Number of error messages received while performing addition/deletion/commit/rollback actions on documents over the lifetime.

fields.explainZh: 平均5分钟内发生的索引合并数。
fields.explainEn: Number of index merges that have occurred within an average of 5 minutes.

fields.explainZh: 平均5分钟内发出的显式优化命令数。
fields.explainEn: Number of explicit optimize commands issued within an average of 5 minutes.

fields.explainZh: 平均5分钟内执行的回滚数。
fields.explainEn: Number of rollbacks within an average of 5 minutes.
Name of the core.

fields.nameZh: 每秒客户端错误数/5分钟
fields.nameEn: Client Errors per Second in 5 Minutes
fields.explainZh: 平均5分钟内客户端在发出请求时所犯的语法或解析错误数。
fields.explainEn: Number of syntax or parsing errors in client requests within an average of 5 minutes.

fields.nameEn: Updated Errors per Second in 5 Minutes
fields.explainZh: 平均5分钟内处理程序遇到的错误数。
fields.explainEn: Number of errors encountered within an average of 5 minutes.

fields.explainZh: 在过去5分钟内每秒收到的请求数。
fields.explainEn: Number of requests per second received over the past 5 minutes.

fields.nameZh: 每秒服务器错误数/5分钟
fields.nameEn: Server Errors per Second in 5 Minutes
fields.explainZh: 平均5分钟内服务器在执行请求时抛出的错误数。
fields.explainEn: Number of errors thrown by the server when executing requests within an average of 5 minutes.

fields.nameEn: Update Responses per Second in 5 Minutes
fields.explainZh: 平均5分钟收到部分结果的响应数。
fields.explainEn: Number of responses received within an average of 5 minutes.

fields.explainZh: 测试IP对应资源的协议连接。
fields.explainEn: Test the protocol connections of the resource corresponding to an IP address.
